code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import'./DashboardPage.css';import{projectAPI,invoiceAPI}from'../utils/api';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function DashboardPage(){const[projects,setProjects]=useState([]);const[summary,setSummary]=useState(null);useEffect(()=>{fetchData();},[]);const fetchData=async()=>{try{const[projectsRes,summaryRes]=await Promise.all([projectAPI.getAll(),invoiceAPI.getSummary()]);setProjects(projectsRes.data);setSummary(summaryRes.data);}catch(error){console.error('Failed to fetch data:',error);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"dashboard",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"\uD83D\uDCBC Time Tracker Dashboard"}),summary&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"summary-grid",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Total Invoiced"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"amount",children:["$",summary.total_invoiced.toFixed(2)]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Paid"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"amount paid",children:["$",summary.paid.toFixed(2)]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Pending"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"amount pending",children:["$",summary.pending.toFixed(2)]})]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Projects"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"projects-list",children:projects.map(project=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"project-item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h4",{children:project.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["Total Hours: ",project.total_hours.toFixed(2)]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["Earned: $",project.total_earned.toFixed(2)]})]},project.id))})]})]});}export default DashboardPage;
